description: Crafted for the cosmopolitan male, this bag from cabarelli is made with materials of superior quality. Wear this utilitarian, monochrome bag with formal or casual ensembles, and don't forget to style your outfit with matching accessories. Length: 12 cm Width: 60 cm Depth: 10 cm duffle bag made of leatherette A detachable shoulder strap Two short handles One main zippered compartment with felt lining Care Wipe with a clean dry cloth to remove dust
